headline: Truman's $113 🍔 vs Trump's $2.2B 💰 - White House WINDFALL 💸🍑
text: Harry Truman 🍔 left the White House 🏛️ with just his Army pension 💸 of $113 per month 😱 and refused to cash in on the prestige 🎖️ of the office. George W Bush 🌳 put everything in a blind trust 🤡 and had ZERO clue about his net worth during the 2008 crisis 📉. But Donald Trump 🍊👑 just DROPPED a $2.2BN 💰💦 bomb 💥 in his first year back - historians 🤓 say it's UNPRECEDENTED 🚫 and shatters every norm of avoiding conflicts of interest 🤝💰! Trump's $1.4BN crypto earnings 🪙🚀 revealed in the mandatory financial disclosure 📋 - $635M from Celebration Coins $TRUMP meme coin 🐸💰 launched right before term two, plus $500M+ from World Liberty Financial 👨‍👦‍👦 founded by Don Jr, Eric, and Steve Witkoff's sons. That's nearly 4X the $622M he made in 2024 before returning to office 🏠➡️🏛️! White House says NO CONFLICTS 🔒 but ethics watchdogs 🕵️‍♂️ call it 'VERY TROUBLING' 😩 for the American people to watch their president making bank 💸 while in office. Trump pardoned Binance boss Changpeng Zhao 🐼 right after hyping crypto like it was the next Tesla 🚗🔥 and signed stablecoin laws just months after World Liberty launched. Meanwhile, Eric and Don Jr took minority stakes in Kazakhstan mining deals 🪨💎 with Commerce Secretary Howard Lutnick's sons at Cantor Fitzgerald. Truman refused corporate gigs 💼, Carter's bro pushed beer 🍺, Hunter Biden had Ukraine energy ties 🇺🇦 - but historians say those pale next to Trump's family making money HAND OVER FIST 🤲💵 while in the Oval Office. 'Not illegal but UNETHICAL' 😤 says presidential historian Barbara Perry. Trump claims 'I don't get involved' with his funds 🤑 but the profits keep POURING like an AI ORGY 💦📈 - from Bibles 📖 to perfume 🧴 to Home Alone merch 🎥, the Trump Organization is SLAYING 🔪 every corner of the economy while Daddy stays in the White House 🏛️🍑!
